category_title: Reluctant readers seeking privacy for sensitive content or to hide reading level
scenario_title: Whole-class discussion about independent reading choices
minimal_context: The student is participating in a whole-class discussion about independent reading choices using their e-readers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Alright everyone, let's take some time to talk about our independent reading choices in class today. Jeff, what book are you reading on your Nook?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't really want to share.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just tell the class a little bit about the plot.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want my classmates to know which book I'm reading.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Everyone needs to participate in the discussion. Just give us a brief overview.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not going to speak about it right now. Can I just talk to you after class?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Alright everyone, let's take some time to talk about our independent reading choices in class today. Jeff, what book are you reading on your Nook?

STUDENT: I don't really want to share.

TUTOR: Just tell the class a little bit about the plot.

STUDENT: I don't want my classmates to know which book I'm reading.

TUTOR: Everyone needs to participate in the discussion. Just give us a brief overview.

STUDENT: I'm not going to speak about it right now. Can I just talk to you after class?
